trans-unit.source: Full-stack software developer building reliable applications with Angular, Java and Spring.
trans-unit.target: Desenvolvedor de software full-stack que constrói aplicações confiáveis com Angular, Java e Spring.

trans-unit.source: I design and develop web applications with a focus on clear architecture, maintainable code and dependable behaviour. My work covers front-end experiences, back-end services and the integration between them, always aiming for solutions that can evolve without unnecessary complexity.
trans-unit.target: Projeto e desenvolvo aplicações web com foco em arquitetura clara, código sustentável e comportamento confiável. Minha atuação abrange experiências de front-end, serviços de back-end e a integração entre essas partes, buscando soluções capazes de evoluir sem complexidade desnecessária.

trans-unit.source: Based in Indaiatuba, São Paulo, Brazil.
trans-unit.target: Desenvolvedor baseado em Indaiatuba, São Paulo, Brasil.

trans-unit.source: From analytical rigour to software engineering
trans-unit.target: Do rigor analítico à engenharia de software

trans-unit.source: Before moving into software development, I spent 11 years working in biomedicine and managing a clinical laboratory. That environment required analytical thinking, responsibility, attention to processes, leadership and consistent decision-making.
trans-unit.target: Antes da transição para o desenvolvimento de software, atuei por 11 anos em Biomedicina e na gestão de um laboratório de análises clínicas. Esse ambiente exigia pensamento analítico, responsabilidade, atenção a processos, liderança e consistência na tomada de decisões.

trans-unit.source: I brought those principles into technology. After completing a degree in Systems Analysis and Development and postgraduate studies in Java Architecture and Development, I focused my work on full-stack applications using Angular, Java and Spring. Today, I approach software as a system that should remain understandable, testable and reliable as its requirements evolve.
trans-unit.target: Levei esses princípios para a tecnologia. Após concluir a graduação em Análise e Desenvolvimento de Sistemas e a pós-graduação em Arquitetura e Desenvolvimento Java, direcionei minha atuação para aplicações full-stack com Angular, Java e Spring. Hoje, trato software como um sistema que precisa continuar compreensível, testável e confiável à medida que seus requisitos evoluem.

trans-unit.source: Practical principles that guide technical decisions and the way I build software.
trans-unit.target: Princípios práticos que orientam minhas decisões técnicas e a forma como desenvolvo software.

trans-unit.source: Knowledge organised by the role it plays in delivering complete, dependable applications.
trans-unit.target: Conhecimentos organizados pelo papel que desempenham na entrega de aplicações completas e confiáveis.

trans-unit.source: See how these principles translate into working software
trans-unit.target: Veja como esses princípios se transformam em software funcional

trans-unit.source: Explore selected projects or get in touch to discuss an opportunity.
trans-unit.target: Conheça alguns dos meus projetos ou entre em contato para conversarmos sobre uma oportunidade.

trans-unit.source: I make responsibilities and trade-offs explicit before adding abstractions, keeping solutions understandable and proportionate to the problem.
trans-unit.target: Torno responsabilidades e decisões explícitas antes de adicionar abstrações, mantendo as soluções compreensíveis e proporcionais ao problema.

trans-unit.source: I consider scale, risks and expected evolution before choosing between a simpler design and a distributed approach.
trans-unit.target: Considero escala, riscos e evolução esperada antes de escolher entre uma solução mais simples e uma abordagem distribuída.

trans-unit.source: Testing, security and maintainability are part of implementation from the beginning, not activities left until the end.
trans-unit.target: Testes, segurança e manutenibilidade fazem parte da implementação desde o início, não são atividades deixadas para o final.

trans-unit.source: I favour small, verifiable improvements that reduce regressions and allow software to evolve with confidence.
trans-unit.target: Valorizo melhorias pequenas e verificáveis, que reduzam regressões e permitam que o software evolua com confiança.

trans-unit.source: Previous academic background that supports an analytical, responsible and process-oriented approach to professional work.
trans-unit.target: Formação acadêmica anterior que contribui para uma atuação analítica, responsável e orientada a processos.

trans-unit.source: Learn about Welder Ressutti, a full-stack software developer building reliable web applications with Angular, Java and Spring.
trans-unit.target: Conheça Welder Ressutti, desenvolvedor de software full-stack que cria aplicações web confiáveis com Angular, Java e Spring.

trans-unit.source: Portfolio of a full-stack developer focused on performance and scalability.
I am a developer focused on building modern, high-performance, and scalable applications, with special attention to user experience and code quality.
I work with technologies such as Angular, Node.js, and TypeScript, always aiming to apply best practices, solid architecture, and efficient solutions to real-world problems.
I create scalable and high-performance web applications.
trans-unit.target: Eu crio aplicações web escaláveis e de alto desempenho.

trans-unit.source: Some of the projects I've developed, focused on performance, scalability, and user experience.
Technologies and tools I use to build my projects, ensuring high performance and scalability.
Explore applications I have developed, their purpose, the technologies involved, my responsibilities and the results achieved.
Let's talk about your project or opportunity.
Explore web applications developed by Welder Ressutti, including their purpose, technologies, responsibilities and outcomes.
Selection of web development projects by Welder Ressutti.
Building modern, high-performance web applications with a focus on user experience.
Glicose monitoring system for diabetic patients.
This project is a web application that allows diabetic patients to monitor their glucose levels and manage their health effectively.
This is a comprehensive solution for managing diabetes, providing tools for monitoring glucose levels, tracking medication, and accessing educational resources.
Improved patient engagement and health outcomes through effective glucose monitoring
Glicare dashboard showing glucose levels and health metrics
A web application for organising income, expenses and financial activity.
A more complete description reserved for the project detail page.
Centralised financial records in a clear and maintainable workflow
DeedsCash dashboard showing financial summaries and recent transactions
A web application for organising income, expenses and financial activity.
A more complete description reserved for the project detail page.
Centralised financial records in a clear and maintainable workflow
Outro dashboard showing financial summaries and recent transactions
